seo.title: BODi’s first ever primal functional training program led by Amoila Cesar. Start Here | BODi
seo.description: CHOP WOOD CARRY WATER is a functional program incorporating primal movement and lifting, that will be a collection of 20 workouts.

trainers.bioBodi: Amoila is an NASM and ISSA certified personal trainer famous for getting professional athletes in seriously good shape—and his live strength, HIIT, and core workouts can do the same for you. In addition to his classes on BODi, Amoila is the creator of 645™, 6 Weeks of THE WORK®, and 4 Weeks of THE PREP™, available on Beachbody On Demand.

data.descriptionShort: Master the movements. Build strength and mobility. Repeat.
data.descriptionLong: Move with more ease in every part of your life. Amoila mixes lifting and primal movement in a way you’ve never seen before to help you build mobility and strength. Prepare your body to achieve what you never knew it could. Master the flow. Get a total-body tune-up. And repeat.

modules.equipment: Dumbbells (Light, Medium, Heavy), Foam Roller*, Towel*, Mat*
modules.categories: Athletic Training, Mobility & Flexibility, Strength, Muscle Building, Slim & Sculpt, Weight Loss, Recovery

media.title: CHOP WOOD CARRY WATER Sample Workout
media.subtitle: 34m

modules.title: Should I CHOP WOOD CARRY WATER?
modules.content: If you want to help increase your strength and mobility, yes! Imagine bench-pressing your kids, easily carrying your suitcase up a flight of stairs, and moving through your day with ease. Master functional moves and discover new power within yourself as you realize the benefits of a continual practice. By the end, the freedom and movement you’ve found will inspire you to start the collection again and relish how your body handles the movements with increasing ease.

modules.title: What are the CHOP WOOD CARRY WATER workouts like?
modules.content: Amoila will take you on this journey with a mix of functional strength training and primal movements. The primal movements are the thread, repeated in each workout and building up to a final Primal Movement Flow, before you repeat the 20-workout cycle. And spread throughout are lifting days, with sequences targeting either specific muscle groups or total body, happen each day. Amoila keeps up the pace as you work toward mastering functional moves that build mobility and strength.

modules.title: What is primal movement?
modules.content: Ground-based, bodyweight movement, in which you flow from one position to another, opens your body and uses stabilizing muscles to improve flexibility, mobility, and stability as you go. The basic forms are known as the ABCs: Ape, Beast, and Crab, along with their variations. For Amoila, these are the movement essentials that allow him to get up every day and be disciplined in the work he wants to do while honoring and listening to his body.

modules.title: Tools for mastery
modules.content: You’ll need light, medium, and heavy dumbbells so that during strength training you can choose the best weight for you at that time. You might also want to have a towel and mat around and keep a foam roller handy for recovery workouts. The program includes all digital materials - Your Guide to CHOP WOOD CARRY WATER, 3 workout calendar options to help you tailor the program to your lifestyle, routine, and goals, and tracker sheets to use as you repeat the program.

modules.title: More opportunities to move
modules.content: Go deeper in your exploration of primal movements with a double workout or exercise on a rest day. Learn each component of a full Turkish get-up in TGU-T (Turkish Get-Up Training), dive into shorter and different flow sequences in Primal Movement Flow Express, or get in a full-body cardio-based workout focused on primal movement in Primal Movement Cardio.

modules.title: Nourish your body
modules.content: Complete your Health Esteem routine with our healthy eating plans, 2B Mindset or Portion Fix. Simple and satisfying, no deprivation, and all you have to do is watch a few short videos to get started. Plus you have access to over 1,000 yummy recipes! And you can enjoy a delicious dessert every day with Shakeology. It’s superfood nutrition with whole-food-based ingredients to help support healthy digestion, energy, and lean muscle.* And of course, fuel your workouts with Energize, a clean pre-workout formula that helps give you a boost of energy and helps sharpen your focus so you can push through every workout with more endurance.*

modules.title: Get the support you need
modules.content: Connect with your free accountability Partner to join a group of people at every level that you can count on for support. You’ll find friends to celebrate your wins and cheer you on when you need it most—or welcome you back with motivation when life gets in the way. It’s your community of like-minded people who always have your back and keep you moving forward.

modules.title: Success Story: Lisa L.
modules.content:
“I reached so many victories. I feel strong. I feel confident. I feel excited to move my body every day… This program is going to make you feel unstoppable. It's a full body workout that opens up your mind and body.”

Lost 10.4lbs, 9.3” total

Click play, stay focused, and learn the 6 stations for a total-body workout in just one move.

Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZIse47.title: Sure Thing
Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZIse47.description: Strength training, healthy eating, clean supplements. A Sure Thing.
Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZIse47.descriptionShort: Strength training, healthy eating, clean supplements. A Sure Thing.
Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZIse47.descriptionLong: Strength builds confidence, so pick up your weights for endurance and power-based strength training and get ready to feel amazing. With Megan as your motivator, you’ll work hard, eat well, fuel up with clean supplements, and see how incredible it is to say YES to YOU.

Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZLdc9T.title: Introduction to 2B Mindset
Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZLdc9T.descriptionLong: 2B Mindset, created by Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, is designed to help you enjoy satisfying meals, achieve a healthy relationship with food and make reaching your goals a positive experience. This proven plan has helped thousands of Ilana’s clients reach their goals, and it’s how Ilana lost 100 lbs. and kept it off as a mother of three. With a BODi membership, you’ll get new recipes every month, plus 24/7 access to the 2B Mindset Exclusive Community, which includes ongoing support from Ilana with LIVE calls, to help you feel your best each day.

trainers.bio: Amoila Cesar is a NASM and ISSA certified personal trainer famous for getting professional athletes in seriously good shape. Along with CHOP WOOD CARRY WATER, he’s also the creator of 645®, 6 Weeks of THE WORK® and 4 Weeks of THE PREP™. He’s led millions worldwide, from professional athletes, A-list celebrities, and CEOs to mothers, entrepreneurs, and more through their fitness journey.

Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZLdhpj.title: Introduction to Portion Fix
Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZLdhpj.descriptionLong: Portion Fix, by fitness and nutrition expert Autumn Calabrese, helps you eat the portions that work for the results you want. You’ll enjoy all the delicious foods you love, even wine and chocolate, and NEVER feel deprived. And there’s no counting calories or cutting food groups. This plan can help you reach your goals, whether it’s weight loss, or just feeling healthier and stronger. With a BODi membership, you’ll get new recipes every month, plus 24/7 access to the Portion Fix Exclusive Community, which includes ongoing support from Autumn, to help you feel great every single day.
